query:
UPDATE wa_conversations wc
JOIN (
  SELECT m.sessionId, m.remoteJid, m.status
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT sessionId, remoteJid, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    GROUP BY sessionId, remoteJid
  ) latest ON m.sessionId = latest.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.id = latest.maxId
  WHERE m.fromMe = 1
) lm ON wc.sessionId = lm.sessionId AND wc.remoteJid = lm.remoteJid
SET wc.lastStatus = lm.status
WHERE wc.lastFromMe = 1
AND FIELD(COALESCE(wc.lastStatus,''), 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played')
  < FIELD(lm.status, 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played')

UPDATE wa_conversations wc
JOIN (
  SELECT m.sessionId, m.remoteJid, m.status
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT sessionId, remoteJid, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    GROUP BY sessionId, remoteJid
  ) latest ON m.sessionId = latest.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.id = latest.maxId
  WHERE m.fromMe = 1
) lm ON wc.sessionId = lm.sessionId AND wc.remoteJid = lm.remoteJid
SET wc.lastStatus = lm.status
WHERE wc.lastFromMe = 1
AND FIELD(COALESCE(wc.lastStatus,''), 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played')
  < FIELD(lm.status, 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played')
